description: Advanced Bitcoin (aBTC) is the native token of the Advanced Bitcoin chain — the most advanced evolution of the original Bitcoin with cutting-edge programmability, efficiency, and on-chain utility — since 2023. As extended utility on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 aBTC drives BTC-pegged pricing, instant finality, ultra-low fees, and massive scalability for store of value, DeFi, and TradeFi worldwide.
name: Advanced Bitcoin
